execution_history.action:
```python
from pptx import Presentation

# Load the presentation file
file_path = "lecture1-2021-with-ink.pptx"
presentation = Presentation(file_path)

# Access the first slide
slide = presentation.slides[0]

# Add or access the Notes Slide
if slide.has_notes_slide:
    notes_slide = slide.notes_slide
else:
    notes_slide = slide.notes_slide

# Define the note content
note_text = ("This slide introduces the lecture on Intelligent Systems (AI-2). "
             "It provides an overview of the course, including goals and timeline.")

# Add the note content
notes_slide.notes_text_frame.text = note_text

# Save the modified presentation
presentation.save(file_path)
```
